title: Evidence Reference v1
description: Canopy stores typed references to data in external ecosystem tools. These are pointer-only — Canopy never copies payloads. Producer: canopy/src/models.rs (EvidenceRef). Consumer: read-only references resolved by operators or dashboards.

task_id.description: ULID of the task this evidence is attached to.

source_kind.description: Which ecosystem tool owns the referenced data.

source_ref.description: Opaque identifier interpretable by the source tool (e.g., hyphae memory ID, session ID).

summary.description: Optional summary of the referenced data.

related_handoff_id.description: Optional handoff this evidence relates to.

related_session_id.description: Optional hyphae session ID for navigation.

related_symbol.description: Optional code symbol name (for rhizome references).
